methods.description: Regularized GLM with elastic net penalty (lasso + ridge). Coordinate descent algorithm with pathwise solution.
methods.notes: Full implementation with cv_glmnet, glmnet_predict, glmnet_coef in regression/glmnet.rs

methods.description: Extreme Gradient Boosting with regularization, handling missing values, and parallel computation.
methods.notes: Implemented as xgboost() in ml/xgboost.rs with L1/L2 regularization. Also fast_xgboost() in ml/xgboost_fast.rs with histogram-based splitting (23-1429x faster)

methods.description: Gradient Boosting Machine for regression and classification with tree base learners.
Light Gradient Boosting Machine with histogram-based learning and leaf-wise tree growth.
methods.notes: Implemented as lightgbm() and lightgbm_predict() in ml/lightgbm.rs with histogram bins and leaf-wise growth

methods.description: L1 + L2 penalized regression with alpha parameter controlling mix.
methods.notes: Part of glmnet implementation (alpha parameter)

methods.description: L1-penalized regression with automatic feature selection.
methods.notes: Implemented as lasso() wrapper around glmnet with alpha=1

methods.description: L2-penalized linear regression with closed-form solution.
methods.notes: Implemented as ridge() wrapper around glmnet with alpha=0

methods.description: CART decision trees with cost-complexity pruning.
methods.notes: Implemented as 'cart' in p2a-core/src/ml/cart.rs

methods.description: Support Vector Machines with RBF, polynomial, and sigmoid kernels.
methods.notes: Implemented with Linear, RBF, Polynomial, Sigmoid kernels via SMO algorithm. Also fast_svm optimized version.

methods.description: Adaptive Boosting for classification with exponential loss.
methods.notes: Supports M1, R2, SAMME variants

methods.description: Model-based gradient boosting framework for GLMs and additive models.
methods.notes: Implemented as mboost() in ml/mboost.rs with Tree, Linear, ComponentwiseLinear base learners. Also fast_mboost() in ml/mboost_fast.rs with parallel feature evaluation (1.7x+ faster at scale)

methods.description: C5.0 decision trees and rule-based models with boosting.
methods.notes: Implemented as c50() in ml/advanced_trees.rs with information gain splitting

methods.description: Rule-based regression with linear models in terminal nodes.
methods.notes: Implemented as cubist() in ml/advanced_trees.rs

methods.description: Quantile Regression Forests for prediction intervals.
methods.notes: Implemented as quantile_rf() in ml/advanced_trees.rs

methods.description: Multivariate Adaptive Regression Splines with hinge functions.
methods.notes: Implemented as mars() in ml/advanced_trees.rs

methods.description: Bayesian Additive Regression Trees for prediction.
methods.notes: Implemented as bart(), bart_predict(), bart_predict_intervals() in ml/bart.rs with MCMC tree sampling

methods.description: Conditional inference trees with unbiased variable selection.
methods.notes: Implemented as ctree() in ml/advanced_trees.rs with permutation tests

methods.description: SHapley Additive exPlanations for model interpretation.
methods.notes: Implemented as shap_values() in ml/interpretability.rs

methods.description: Partial Dependence Plots showing marginal effect of features.
methods.notes: Implemented for GBM and CART models

methods.description: Individual Conditional Expectation curves for local interpretation.
methods.notes: Implemented as ice_curves() in ml/interpretability.rs

methods.description: Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations.
methods.notes: Implemented as lime() in ml/interpretability.rs

methods.description: Permutation-based variable importance for feature selection.
methods.notes: Implemented as MDI extraction from RF, GBM, CART models

methods.description: All-relevant feature selection using shadow features.
methods.notes: Implemented as boruta() in ml/advanced_trees.rs

methods.description: ROC curves and AUC for binary classification evaluation.
methods.notes: Includes confusion matrix, sensitivity, specificity, F1, MCC, Kappa. Also fast_roc_auc with O(n log n) Mann-Whitney U.

methods.description: Apriori algorithm for frequent itemset mining and association rules.
methods.notes: Implemented as apriori() and eclat() in ml/apriori.rs
